# Hooke v0.0.1 — Project Setup & Milestones

## Overview

Set up `valence-labs/hooke` as the primary repo. Migration to `recursionpharma/hooke` can be evaluated later — git history can be carried over seamlessly; if not, it's not a blocker.

## Setup Plan

- [ ] **initStack tag** — initial project scaffold (broadly same as current state)
- [ ] Keep `hooke-core` main branch empty
- [ ] Skills and docs live in the repo root
- [ ] Code lives in a dedicated subfolder (no submodules — they haunt codebases)
- [ ] Test on Cas' PR as first validation
- [ ] Unify CI/CD later

## v0.0.1 Milestones

- [ ] **Hooke the library** — clean package / notebook interface
- [ ] **Clean testing structure** — tests only where people are already comfortable
- [ ] **(Lazy) load PX and TX models**
- [ ] **SLURM inference**
- [ ] **Valence data folder cache** (or BigQuery — ty Cas) — no more random parquets in home dirs for core data and models
- [ ] **Generate maps**
- [ ] **Run benchmarks**
- [ ] **Return metrics & log in W&B**

## Follow-up

- Turn each milestone into its own issue and assign owners
